description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages check-test-build and deploy, using a before_script that makes master-sample-web/gradlew executable, sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to .gradle, sets TZ to Asia/Tokyo, and writes the current timestamp to exectime.txt. Define reusable job templates .web-build, .web-checkstyle, .web-spotbugs (all using the java:8 image) and .web-test (using sesela/java8-mysqlclient) each caching .gradle/wrapper and .gradle/caches with key $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG. The .web-build template runs gradlew clean build and then computes total JaCoCo coverage with an awk command on master-sample-web/build/reports/jacoco/jacocoMergedReport/jacocoMergedReport.csv. The .web-checkstyle template runs gradlew clean checkstyleMain checkstyleTest; the .web-spotbugs template runs gradlew clean spotbugsMain spotbugsTest; the .web-test template starts a mysql:5.7.24 service, creates a sandbox database using MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD, runs gradlew clean testReport jacocoMergedReport with MySQL profile and connection parameters, and finally computes coverage with the same awk command. Concrete jobs job-web-build, job-web-checkstyle, job-web-spotbugs, and job-web-test extend the respective templates, with job-web-build limited to master and develop* branches and publishing artifacts (reports, javadoc, libs) named web$(cat exectime.txt) that expire in one week, while the other three jobs run on all other branches (except master and develop*).
